subject: Furfrou, a fluffy white dog-like creature, resting in an indoor setting with flowers
description: A large, fluffy white dog-like creature reclines in a relaxed pose, its dense fur styled in a distinctive rounded trim around its face and body. Small decorative flowers are visible in the background suggesting an indoor or garden setting. The creature's expression is composed and aloof. The art palette is soft and light-toned, with the creature's white fur dominating the frame.
foreground: large fluffy white dog creature resting
background: soft indoor setting with decorative flowers
